summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of a stellar 1970 acoustic‑heavy show, highlighted by tight Race Is On and Wake Up Little Susie performances.
review: The mix by Charlie Miller is praised for its extraordinary clarity and balance, letting every acoustic guitar line shine while still delivering a solid electric second set. Reviewers rave about the energetic acoustic numbers – especially Race Is On, Wake Up Little Suzie and New Speedway Boogie – with only one complaint about a harsh fade‑out in the recording.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both performance (tight acoustic set, good electric set) and technical quality (crisp soundboard mix), with only a single minor recording complaint.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear mix with superb channel separation; listeners can crank volume loud. One reviewer noted a harsh fade‑out at the end of a track.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Acoustic first set shines with tight, energetic performances; a second acoustic guitar adds depth. The electric set is solid and rounds out the show.
